headline: Stock Market Today: Dow Dives 600 Points On U.S.-Iran News As Oil Surges (Live Coverage)
summary: Stock Market Today: The Dow Jones index dived 600 points Monday as oil prices surged on the U.S.-Iran conflict. Nvidia stock dropped.
